mapper.select:
SELECT ni.id, ni.item_name, ni.description, ni.level_id, ni.frequency, ni.create_time, ni.update_time, nl.level_name AS level_name FROM nursing_item ni LEFT JOIN nursing_level nl ON ni.level_id = nl.id AND nl.deleted = 0 WHERE ni.deleted = 0
AND (ni.item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nl.level_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY ni.create_time DESC
